title: Add approval actions to Tickflow dashboard
description: Allow users to review tick details in /tickflow-dashboard and approve or reject awaiting ticks from the dashboard. The dashboard must expose enough tick detail/evidence before actions are available.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard detail pane shows title, description, acceptance, notes/awaiting/requires and latest evidence; approval/rejection keys operate on selected awaiting ticks; go test ./... passes
closed_reason: Added dashboard detail review fields plus detail-only approve/reject keys; approved current ynr and qq2 gates; go test ./... passes
